title: Simple Grass Flowers
description: Gives Grass, Podzol, Mycelium, Crimson Nylium, and Warped Nylium vanilla-friendly flowers, clovers, and rocks!
body:
![Title](https://i.postimg.cc/yYXNKdtq/minecraft-title.png)

                    [![Bluesky](https://img.shields.io/badge/Bluesky-Follow-448DEE?style=for-the-badge&logo=bluesky&logoColor=white&labelColor=454545)](https://bsky.app/profile/2dwisp.com) [![Xwitter](https://img.shields.io/badge/Xwitter-Follow-1A1A1A?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=white&labelColor=454545)](https://x.com/2DWisp) [![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCXzb8erNlBkcd6VmE4JWj2A?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&label=YouTube&labelColor=454545&color=E52D27&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2F%402dwisp)](https://www.youtube.com/@2dwisp) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-Support-FF5E5B?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white&labelColor=454545)](https://ko-fi.com/2dwisp)


                                                        
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/simple-grass-flowers?style=for-the-badge&label=Modrinth&logo=Modrinth&logoColor=white&labelColor=454545&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers)
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/551206?style=for-the-badge&label=CurseForge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&labelColor=454545&color=F1641E)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/simple-grass-flowers)

## 🌻 Introduction:

Adds flowers, rocks, clovers, and other vanilla-friendly details to grass, podzol, and mycelium blocks. 

No mods are required.

If you want lower grass sides, install my other pack [Simple Lower Grass Sides](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-lower-grass-sides) alongside this pack!

[If you want a Bare Bones compatible version, install this pack instead.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-grass-flowers)

## 🤔 Frequently Asked Questions:

**Q: How do I install the pack?**  
A: Follow [this guide](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/how-to-install-minecraft-texture-packs-4615399/).

**Q: Can you port this to Bedrock?**  
A: I currently have no plans to port this to Bedrock.

**Q: Can someone else port this to Bedrock?**  
A: No, I do not allow third-party ports of my packs.

**Q: Can you add this feature?**  
A: Maybe! Comment any suggestions and we can see what happens.

**Q: I found a bug!**  
A: Comment all bugs and I will fix them as soon as possible.

**Q: Does this pack work on X version?**  
A: It really depends. Sometimes older versions work perfectly fine, other times they do not. Some of the features of this pack require features that are only available for newer versions of the game, or use different file names than those in earlier versions. As a rule of thumb, the earliest version this pack will somewhat work on is **1.15**.

**Q: Does this work on servers?**  
A: Yes! It works perfectly fine on servers and is intended to be vanilla-enough so that vanilla builds will still look good with it on and vice versa.[If you're in need of a server you can get one using my affiliate link!](https://bisecthosting.com/jamie)

**Q: Can I add this to my modpack?**  
A: Of course! Though you must give credit (you should be for all authors anyway) and can not claim any of my work as your own.
